title: Happy Creeper Ghast
description: Texture pack for the Happy Ghast changing its appearance to a creeper, with a sunglasses harness taking place of the white harness
body:
Did you ever think of the Happy Ghast reimagined as a giant creeper head? This texture pack is for you! This reuses the base creeper texture (no upscaling).

This also includes (and replaces) the white harness as sunglasses.
